name: failure-chamber
description: A claustrophobic room of short faults, unstable reflections, and punishing midrange hits.

sections.name: faults
sections.intent: Small glitches appear as if a device is trying to boot.

sections.name: containment
sections.intent: Dense events crowd the bed channels while height channels catch splinters.

sections.name: brownout
sections.intent: Punish and catastrophic events dominate before the room collapses.

example_command: cargo run -- piece --output out/failure-chamber.wav --scene failure-chamber --random-preset restless --seed 42002
